titles.title: A bill to amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize a public health and bio-preparedness workforce loan repayment program.
A bill to amend the Public Health Service Act to reauthorize a public health and bio-preparedness workforce loan repayment program.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions.

committee.name: Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions
